message.content:
@startuml
actor "laboratory coordinator" as LC
participant ":LabCoordinatorUI" as LCU
participant ":ValidateTestReportController" as VTRC
participant ":Company" as C
participant "rp : TestStore" as TS
participant "rp : Test" as T
participant "rp : TestReportStore" as TRS
participant "rp : TestReport" as TR
participant ":TestDiagnosis" as TD

LC -> LCU: 1 asks to validate report and diagnosis
activate LCU
LCU -> VTRC: 2 createTestList()
activate VTRC
VTRC -> C: 3 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate C
C -> TS: 4 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate TS
TS -> T: 5 get = getTestList()
deactivate TS
C -> TRS: 6 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate TRS
TRS -> TR: 7 get = getTestReportList()
activate TR
TR -> TD: 8 get = getTestDiagnosis()
deactivate TD
deactivate TR
deactivate TRS
deactivate C
deactivate VTRC
ref over LCU,VTRC: US15_SD_testReportsDTO.puml
VTRC --> LCU: 9
deactivate LCU
LCU --> LC: 10 shows the available test reports and diagnosis and requests selection
LC -> LCU: 11 chooses all tests
activate LCU
LCU --> LC: 12 asks for confirmation
LC -> LCU: 13 confirms selection
LCU -> VTRC: 14 validateAllTestReport()
activate VTRC
loop
    VTRC -> TS: 15 validateTestReport(testId)
    activate TS
    TS -> T: 16 setState(VALIDATED)
    deactivate T
    VTRC -> TS: 17 registerValidationDate(date)
    TS -> T: 18 setValidationDate(date)
    deactivate T
    deactivate TS
end
deactivate VTRC
LCU --> LC: 19 informs operation success
deactivate LCU
@enduml
